name: release-readiness
description: Report-only release readiness loop for version, changelog, quality gates, drift, and human release decisions.

cadence.recommended: before release or daily during release week
cadence.notes: Run before version commits and during release windows. Do not auto-release.

successMetrics: release blockers found before version commit
clear evidence for every readiness verdict
notes: Use this loop to produce a release decision packet, not to make the release decision itself.
